name: organic_sessions_mom
definition: Month-over-month change in sessions from google / organic referrer (or GSC clicks if analytics absent).
target_hint: Early dev tool: +15–30% MoM after first cluster indexed. New domain: flat months 1–2 is normal.

name: indexed_pages_count
definition: URLs in GSC 'Indexed' status for target cluster.
target_hint: 100% of shipped cluster pages indexed within 21 days; if not, fix internal links + sitemap.

name: commercial_page_impressions
definition: GSC impressions on comparison / alternatives / vs URLs.
target_hint: 500+ impressions/page by D+60 on niche terms; <100 at D+90 → merge or rewrite.

name: organic_signup_rate
definition: Signups or trial starts from organic sessions / organic sessions.
target_hint: 2–8% for tight ICP match on commercial pages; <1% → LP or message mismatch.

name: cluster_avg_ctr
definition: Average CTR across cluster pages in GSC (28-day window).
target_hint: ≥2.5% on branded+commercial; <1.5% with >1k impressions → title/meta refresh.

name: internal_link_coverage
definition: % of cluster pages with ≥2 internal links from hub (docs/blog home) and ≥1 link to signup/docs depth.
